# Generated by sml2c for FMU 'Engine'.  Do not edit by hand.
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)
project(Engine C)

# Vendored FMI 3.0 headers live in include/ alongside model.h.
# No FetchContent / network access needed at build time.
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD 11)
set(CMAKE_C_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)
set(CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE ON)

add_library(Engine SHARED
    src/fmu.c
    src/model.c
)
target_include_directories(Engine PRIVATE include)
target_compile_definitions(Engine PRIVATE FMI3_FUNCTION_PREFIX=Engine_)

if (CMAKE_C_COMPILER_ID MATCHES "GNU|Clang")
    target_compile_options(Engine PRIVATE -Wall -Wextra)
endif()

enable_testing()
add_subdirectory(test)
